caption: A woman with blonde hair tied in a bun is captured in a medium shot against a plain, light-gray background. She is wearing a dark navy blazer over a red top and is seen in profile, facing right. She sits at a table, her hands clasped in front of her, with a clear plastic water bottle standing on the table to her left. In the top left corner of the scene, the white text "mediasite" is visible next to a logo consisting of two interlocking squares. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains seated and maintains a similar posture, though she slightly shifts her head and gaze, appearing to listen or prepare to speak. The lighting is consistent and flat across all frames, and there are no other people or significant changes in the environment.
